input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.10.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.10.2.1
            TITLE: after the team registers onsite, the accumulator must remain on the competition site until

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.10.2.1: After the team registers onsite, the Accumulator must remain on the competition site until
EV.10.2.1 After the team registers onsite, the Accumulator must remain on the competition site until 
the end of the competition, or the team withdraws and leaves the site

final_answer: After the team registers onsite, the Accumulator must remain on the competition site until the end of the competition, or the team withdraws and leaves the site
